audit_items.proof_trace: The validateDataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest function lacks epoch range validation against MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS (confirmed by TODO at line 134). The parallel byRoot handler implements this check (lines 18-23), but byRange does not, allowing requests for slots older than the serve window to be processed instead of rejected with RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends P2P DataColumnSidecarsByRange request with startSlot from epoch older than currentEpoch - 4096. Handler processes request instead of rejecting, causing unnecessary DB queries and violating spec requirement that peers MUST support only the serve range window.
